title: The President’s Cake with Chung Suet Ying (Student Screening)

title_lang.en: The President’s Cake with Chung Suet Ying (Student Screening)
title_lang.zh_hk: 《總統的生日蛋糕》鍾雪瑩陪你睇戲學生場

synopsis:
“We've gone from one egg each to one egg for a whole family.” In 1990s, Iraq suffered from military and economic sanctions, commodities such as eggs and flour were luxurious. Yet President Saddam Hussein demanded the entire nation to celebrate his birthday. 9-year-old Lamia was chosen by her school to bake a birthday cake for the President. Lamia followed her grandmother into the city to hunt for cake ingredients. Along the way, Lamia encountered the seamy side of human nature with bitter reality, contrasted with the sweetness of friendship and resilience. Winner of Golden Camera and Directors’ Fortnight Audience Award at Cannes Film Festival.


The post-screening discussion will be held in Cantonese.
cast: Baneen Ahmad Nayyef, Sajad Mohamad Qasem, Waheed Thabet Khreibat, Rahim AlHaj

cast_lang.en: Baneen Ahmad Nayyef, Sajad Mohamad Qasem, Waheed Thabet Khreibat, Rahim AlHaj
cast_lang.zh_hk: 巴恩艾哈邁德納耶夫、薩賈德穆罕默德卡森、華希德塔比特奎百特、拉希姆阿爾哈伊

subtitle: Chinese,English
